subcodes.first_line: O Pen! Turn Thy face towards Qáf and Mím, and make mention therein of the chosen ones of God and His sincere servants who have hearkened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلم ول وجهک شطر القاف و المیم ثم اذکر فیها اولیاء الله و اصفیائه الذین سمعوا
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
